title: narrative_momentum
description: Score the momentum of a crypto narrative or topic. Analyzes Twitter/X social signals. Response uses score (not momentum_score), mention_count (not tweet_count), and sentiment is a number from -1 to +1.

query.description: Narrative topic, token name, or project to analyze

sentiment.description: Sentiment score from -1.0 (very bearish) to +1.0 (very bullish)

influencer_ratio.description: Ratio of high-follower accounts in the conversation (0-1)

top_tweets.description: Top tweets by engagement (capped to 3 items, .text field removed by compaction)
